V0040_01_00_00_0.text:
Sure!
I think you're good enough to Duel me!

V0040_01_00_01_0.text:
To the arena!  
I will eat you alive! Growl!

V0040_01_00_02_0.text:
Hurry up!
I want to get started!

V0040_01_00_03_0.text: It's not smart to question my Dueling credentials!

V0040_01_00_04_0.text:
You sure you're ready?
I’m the #1 Duelist in America!

V0040_01_00_05_0.text:
Hooray!
I can't wait to Duel against my Yugi!

V0040_01_00_06_0.text: If I win, promise that you'll change back into my Yugi!

V0040_01_00_07_0.text:
Here I go, Duke!
No holding back!

V0040_01_00_08_0.text: This American champion isn't afraid of anyone!

V0040_03_00_00_0.text: You're super close to losing this Duel!

V0040_03_00_01_0.text: Any last words before I end you for good?

V0040_03_00_05_0.text: There's no way I'm gonna lose to you!

V0040_05_00_00_0.text: Without skill, there's no such thing as luck!

V0040_07_09_00_0.text: This is the card I Set!

V0040_07_09_01_0.text: I flip over my Set card!

V0040_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0040_21_00_00_0.text: What are you gonna do now?

V0040_21_00_04_0.text:
Aaaargh!
You won't get away with this!

V0040_28_00_00_0.text: Why are you so surprised? That's so rude.

V0040_28_00_01_0.text: None of this is hard to do if you're a genius like me!

V0040_28_00_02_0.text:
Bravo! Yay me!
We won, Teddy!

V0040_28_00_03_0.text:
Told ya I'm a genius!
Do you even know how to spell genius?

V0040_28_00_04_0.text: You play with kiddie gloves, you deserve to lose!

V0040_28_00_05_0.text: Now that I won, you owe me a date!

V0040_28_00_06_0.text: Since I won, it's time for you to switch with my Yugi!

V0040_28_00_07_0.text:
Talent and skill!
That's why I'm the American champ!

V0040_28_00_08_0.text: I knew you were just a kid.

V0040_28_00_09_0.text: KaibaCorp needs to hire me so I can teach you how to Duel!

V0040_29_00_01_0.text:
Congratulations.
But you owe me a rematch.

V0040_29_00_02_0.text: I didn't win this time, but there's always next time!

V0040_29_00_03_0.text:
Oh no...
This is a nightmare!

V0040_29_00_04_0.text: You have to be pretty good to take down the American champ!

V0040_29_00_05_0.text:
I knew my Yugi was the best!
Let's Duel again!

V0040_29_00_06_0.text:
It doesn't matter which Yugi I Duel.
They're both tough.

V0040_29_00_07_0.text:
Oh no...
The Seal of Orichalcos is unstoppable...

V0040_29_00_08_0.text:
How can this kid be so strong?
And what's with that card?

V0040_33_00_00_0.text:
I've been called a genius.
But also a prodigy!

V0040_33_00_01_0.text: My grandfather taught me these tactics!

V0040_33_00_02_0.text: I'll show you what the American champion can do!

V0040_30_00_00_0.text: It's not nice to keep a lady waiting. Hurry up!

V0040_30_00_01_0.text: You stole my Blue-Eyes! Give it back!

V0040_30_00_02_0.text: That's no way to treat a lady!

V0040_34_00_00_0.text: Shh! Be quiet! I'm trying to think!

V0040_34_00_04_0.text: Don't treat me like a little kid! I'm a college student!

V0040_34_00_05_0.text: Do you remember the promise you made me, darling?

V0040_34_00_09_0.text: That was so mean! I'll get you for that!

V0040_34_00_10_0.text: That card is so rare that no one's seen it before!

V0040_34_00_11_0.text: Scientists say there are other dimensions than this one.

V0040_32_00_01_0.text: Hurry up and access the Duel Links app!

V0040_35_00_01_0.text:
Everyone knows I'm a genius!
G-E-N-I-U-S!

V0040_36_00_02_0.text: Argh... Can you turn things around?

V0040_36_00_03_0.text: We're the strongest couple out here!

V0040_08_00_01_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Stray Lambs!

V0040_08_00_02_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Stamping Destruction!

V0040_08_00_03_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Token Thanksgiving!

V0040_08_00_04_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Dragon's Gunfire!

V0040_08_00_05_0.text: I'll activate the Spell Card, Tribute to The Doomed!

V0040_08_00_06_0.text: Time for the Equip Spell, Ring of Magnetism!

V0040_08_00_06_1.text: Its magnetic power pulls your monsters in!

V0040_08_00_07_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, The Shallow Grave!

V0040_08_00_08_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Graceful Charity!

V0040_08_00_10_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Stop Defense!

V0040_08_00_11_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Pot of Greed!

V0040_08_00_13_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Polymerization!

V0040_08_00_14_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Poison of the Old Man!

V0040_08_00_15_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Goblin Thief!

V0040_08_00_16_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Emergency Provisions!

V0040_08_00_17_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Gravity Bind!

V0040_08_00_17_1.text: When it's in play, Level 4 or higher monsters can't attack!

V0040_08_00_18_0.text: I activate the Continuous Trap, Imperial Order!

V0040_08_00_19_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Rope of Life!

V0040_08_00_20_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Dragon's Rage!

V0040_08_00_21_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Mirror Force!

V0040_08_00_22_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Solemn Wishes!

V0040_08_00_23_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Trade-In!

V0040_08_00_25_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Trial of the Princesses!

V0040_08_00_26_0.text: I'll use Trial of the Princesses's effect!

V0040_08_00_27_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Primite Fusion!

V0040_08_00_28_0.text: I banish Primite Fusion from my Graveyard to use its effect!

V0040_08_00_29_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Primite Drillbeam!

V0040_08_00_30_0.text: Primite Drillbeam's effect activates from my Graveyard!

V0040_08_00_31_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Primite Roar!

V0040_08_00_32_0.text: I activate Primite Roar's effect from my Graveyard!

V0040_08_00_33_0.text: I activate the Continuous Spell, Primite Lordly Lode!

V0040_08_00_34_0.text: I activate Primite Lordly Lode's effect!

V0040_08_00_35_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Primite Howl!

V0040_08_00_36_0.text: I banish Primite Howl from my Graveyard to use its effect!

V0040_08_00_37_0.text: I activate the Counter Trap, Primite Scream!

V0040_08_00_38_0.text: Primite Scream's effect activates from my Graveyard!

V0040_09_00_00_0.text: Guardian Angel Joan activates her effect!

V0040_09_00_01_0.text: I activate Cannon Soldier MK-2's effect!

V0040_09_00_02_0.text: Darklord Marie activates her effect from the Graveyard!

V0040_09_00_04_0.text: Witch of the Black Forest activates her effect!

V0040_09_00_05_0.text: I pay my LP to increase Injection Fairy Lily's ATK!

V0040_09_00_08_0.text: Sangan activates its effect when it goes to the Graveyard!

V0040_09_00_10_0.text: Skull-Mark Ladybug activates when it goes to the Graveyard!

V0040_09_00_11_0.text: I activate Golden Ladybug's effect from my hand!

V0040_09_00_13_0.text: Spirit of the Breeze activates her effect!

V0040_09_00_18_0.text: Divine Dragon Lord Felgrand activates its effect!

V0040_09_00_19_0.text: Felgrand activates when it's revived from the Graveyard!

V0040_09_00_20_0.text: Primite Dragon Nether Berzelius activates its effect!

V0040_09_00_21_0.text: I activate Dragolithia Kunzite's effect from my hand!

V0040_09_00_22_0.text: I banish Kunzite from my Graveyard to activate its effect!

V0040_09_00_23_0.text: I activate Primite Imperial Dragon's effect from my hand!

V0040_09_00_24_0.text: Primite Imperial Dragon activates its effect!

V0040_09_00_25_0.text: Summoning Primite Dragon Ether Beryl activates its effect!

V0040_09_00_26_0.text: I Tribute Ether Beryl to activate its effect!

V0040_09_00_27_0.text: Ether Beryl activates its effect from my Graveyard!

V0040_13_00_00_0.text: This card is the key to my combo!

V0040_13_00_02_0.text: I'll show you the tactics my grandfather taught me!

V0040_13_00_21_0.text: I Special Summon a Sheep Token!

V0040_13_00_22_0.text: I Special Summon a Lamb Token!

V0040_37_00_00_0.text:
Grandfather!
I'm finally able to play this card!

V0040_13_00_24_0.text:
Come on out!
Divine Dragon Lord Felgrand!

V0040_13_00_26_0.text:
Hyozanryu!
Show 'em what you can do!

V0040_13_00_30_0.text:
Spread your wings!
Primite Dragon Nether Berzelius!

V0040_19_00_07_0.text: Witch of the Black Forest attacks!

V0040_49_00_00_0.text: This is going to be a fast one!
